name: jeffs-scan-agent
description: Shop-PC scan intake agent: watches the ScanSnap SMB drop folders and uploads to Supabase via the document-intake-agent gateway (docs/document-intake/document-intake-plan.md D5/D12).

scripts.check: node --check src/agent.mjs && node --check src/pipeline.mjs && node --check src/ledger.mjs && node --check src/watcher.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/sniff.mjs
